photos.prompt: Professional sports photography of a muscular male wrestler standing in an aggressive wrestling stance on a competition mat. He wears an innovative full-body wrestling singlet covered in biomimetic predator-skin textures: shark denticle texture on the shoulders, snake scale pattern across the torso, crocodile hide texture on the thighs. A raised ridge runs along the spine made of molded foam. The entire suit is anthracite black with subtle matte iridescent shifts. The wrestler faces the camera at a three-quarter angle, intense expression, dramatic arena overhead spotlights casting hard shadows. Editorial sports magazine quality, 85mm lens, high contrast, dark moody atmosphere.
photos.caption: Концепт «Хищник» — биомиметические текстуры хищников на поверхности формы. Борец — не человек в трико, а существо.

photos.prompt: Professional sports photography of a powerful male wrestler standing at attention on a wrestling mat, wearing a tactical military-inspired wrestling singlet. The suit has visual zones resembling ballistic armor plates on chest and back, flat decorative webbing strips across the torso mimicking a tactical vest, a large bold ID number '07' printed on the back in military stencil font. Color palette: olive drab, tan, and graphite in geometric blocks. The wrestler faces the camera frontally, arms at sides, chin slightly raised, commanding presence. Dramatic side lighting, dark arena background. Editorial sports photography, 85mm lens, cinematic color grading.
photos.caption: Концепт «Тактик» — военная эстетика превращает борца в оперативника. ID-номер вместо фамилии, бронепластины вместо полосок.

photos.prompt: Professional sports photography of an athletic male wrestler standing in a wrestling ready position on a dark mat. He wears a completely black wrestling singlet with alternating matte and ultra-matte black zones. The shoulders, forearms, and quadriceps have subtle graphite metallic accents that catch the light, while the waist and neck zones absorb all light, making the silhouette appear to fragment and dissolve into shadow. Thin retroreflective threads trace muscle contour lines that flash under the arena lights. The wrestler faces the camera at three-quarter angle, mysterious presence, the body seems to break apart into floating fragments. Dramatic spotlight from above, very dark background, high contrast. Editorial sports photography, 85mm lens.
photos.caption: Концепт «Фантом» — чередование матового и ультра-матового чёрного разбивает силуэт. Борец — тень, которую невозможно считать.

photos.prompt: Professional sports photography of a muscular male wrestler wearing a full-coverage futuristic cyberpunk wrestling bodysuit from high standing collar to ankles. The suit is matte graphite with glowing electric blue geometric circuit board patterns and a neural network design covering the entire body. Reflective nodes glow at joint points: shoulders, elbows, knees. Thermochromic zones on the chest show a blue-to-red color transition. Interface strips on the forearms resemble digital displays. The wrestler stands in a powerful stance facing the camera, lit by cool blue and warm red rim lights. Dark arena background with subtle neon glow. Evangelion plug suit aesthetic, cyberpunk, sci-fi. Editorial sports photography, 85mm lens, cinematic lighting.
photos.caption: Концепт «Нексус» — пилот Евангелиона на борцовском ковре. Термохромные зоны меняют цвет от нагрева тела во время схватки.

photos.prompt: Professional sports photography of an intense male wrestler in an aggressive stance on a wrestling mat. He wears a deliberately asymmetric wrestling singlet: one shoulder has a high wide strap covering the deltoid, the other shoulder is completely bare. Jagged diagonal torn strips across the torso create a ripped armor effect. Bold red and black contrast coloring. Aggressive angular typography with number and country code printed at sharp angles. One arm has a compression sleeve to the elbow, the other arm is bare. The wrestler snarls at the camera, fists clenched, raw aggression. Dramatic red-tinted rim lighting from one side, cool blue from the other. Dark arena. Editorial sports photography, 85mm lens, high energy.
photos.caption: Концепт «Берсерк» — намеренная асимметрия и контролируемый хаос. Не спортсмен — берсерк. Непредсказуемость как визуальное оружие.

photos.prompt: Professional sports photography of a massive heavyweight male wrestler standing motionless facing the camera on a wrestling mat. He wears a wrestling singlet designed to maximize visual mass: extremely wide 15cm shoulder straps creating a dramatic Y-silhouette on the back, horizontal bands across the chest that visually widen the torso. All black base with a single bold red stripe running diagonally. Minimal graphics, maximum volume — the uniform is architecture, not decoration. The wrestler stands with feet wide apart, arms slightly away from body, immovable stance like a wall. Dramatic top-down lighting emphasizing the massive silhouette. Dark background. Editorial sports photography, 85mm lens, monumental feeling.
photos.caption: Концепт «Монолит» — весь дизайн решает одну задачу: борец выглядит на 10 кг тяжелее. Форма как архитектура.

photos.prompt: Professional sports photography, split comparison image showing two wrestlers side by side. LEFT SIDE: a wrestler wearing a plain, generic, unflattering red wrestling singlet, traditional basic design with thin straps, looks like underwear, standing flat-footed under flat fluorescent gym lighting, looking unimpressive and awkward. RIGHT SIDE: the same body type wrestler wearing a futuristic dark tactical wrestling singlet with wide shoulder straps, textured surface zones, geometric armor-like panels, glowing accent lines, standing in a powerful dominant stance under dramatic arena spotlights, looking like a weapon. Both wrestlers face the camera. Clear dramatic contrast between old boring design and new powerful revolutionary design. Editorial comparison photography, 85mm lens.
photos.caption: Слева — стандартное трико, превращающее атлета в школьника. Справа — форма, превращающая его в оружие.
